Intraday post (14/July)

Weekly post is out.

SPX is currently trading at 6237 during the premarket…Coding today’s positioning:

The positioning is a net short fly pattern with a net positive speed exposure. Theta risk is high, and market will more like oscillating than trending ahead of datas and earnings. The centroid zone falls at 6241.53 - 6237.73, this is where most gravity is centered. Spot needs to break through 6221.54 to the downside or above 6250.15 to the upside to escape this ‘gravity’, both direction needs relatively elevated vol.

Centroid area is a very strong pivot today, especially after 1.30PM, it seems unbreakable after. Focus on its lower border… Above this, 6265 can pull the price toward itself, especially in the power hour, if spot is above the ‘upside pivot’.

To the upside, I code 6300 as max. Above 6273 we would see spot up/vol up gamma squeeze towards 6300, but only before 1.35PM.If price is above 5273 after this time, 6285 is a local magnet.

To the downside, I code 6205/02 as min, very strong in the last 2 hours, and would push the price back up to 6225 local pin. This line however can be brokenin the first hours with high vol. From the watch for 6175, where vol should be swallowed, and the mean reversion thresholds…

OptionsDepth Heatmap

(Description is here)

In my read, this environment is too uncertain. I’d avoid trading today, except in the firs 2 hours, if one of the upside resistance or downside support is touched, and bet on reversion. No options today. Only futures or ETFs.
